researcher.research_identity_note: Primary interest is substantive economic geography for policy. Current skills are leverage/fallback, not a rigid filter. Priority is finding opportunities matching broad 'economic geography for policy' interest.

1.name: Cardiff + Welsh Economic Geography
1.description: Cardiff School of Geography and Planning postdocs, or portable fellowships hostable at Cardiff for economic geography. Established connection via Prof Robert Huggins research visit.

subcategories.a_cardiff_broad: Cardiff Business School or other Cardiff departments
subcategories.b_netherlands: Any Dutch university economic geography. Note: MSc from Groningen = Dutch academic connection, possible NWO eligibility

4.name: Indonesia: BRIN and UGM

timeline.note: NEVER exclude based on timeline. Flag mismatches in scoring only.

design_principles.never_exclude: NEVER exclude or hide opportunities based on timeline, theme mismatch, or eligibility. Everything broadly in economic geography/regional economics is collected. Scoring and visual flags handle differentiation.
design_principles.only_hard_exclusion: Only exclude postings clearly outside academia or clearly outside economics/geography entirely. Also exclude PhD/doctoral positions (configured in exclude_position_types).
design_principles.eligibility_uncertain: When eligibility is unclear, mark as 'check eligibility' rather than excluding.
